name: [GRIDHAND] Industry Specialist Agent - Gym: member not visited in 2 weeks → check-in SMS

gridhand.scenario: Gym: member not visited in 2 weeks → check-in SMS
gridhand.description: When a gym member hasn't checked in to a workout session for two weeks, GRIDHAND's automation workflow is triggered to send a personalized check-in SMS via Twilio at 10am on the 15th day of inactivity, allowing the gym owner to re-engage the member with a special promotion or a motivational message. This workflow is synchronized with the gym's membership management system, Glofox, to ensure accurate and up-to-date member activity records, enabling the gym owner to track the effectiveness of the re-engagement campaign. By sending a timely and targeted SMS, the gym owner can encourage inactive members to return, thereby increasing revenue and reducing member churn.
